settings.title: Ledgerworks Now Offers Real-Time Cloud Bookkeeping
settings.excerpt: Clients can now see their numbers update through the month instead of waiting for a quarterly report.
settings.body:
For a long time, small business owners only saw a true picture of their finances after the quarter closed. By then the information was useful for history but not for decisions.

Our new cloud bookkeeping service changes that. We connect to your bank feed and keep your accounts reconciled through the month, so you can log in any day and see where you stand.

The service includes a short monthly call to talk through what the numbers are telling you. It is built for owners who want to make decisions on current information, not last quarter's.
